name: Cloudflare One Team Rename Plan
preflight: Confirm the desired team name is available.
Inventory MDM and device-local organization overrides.
Reconcile enrollment and Access principals before the rename.
Record Access audiences and device profiles for rollback.
Test one non-critical device before broad migration.
Update Worker team-domain configuration only after Cloudflare confirms the rename.
apply_requires: Only the underlying auth-domain rename remains blocked by Cloudflare Dashboard SSO ownership.
